### Fix 3
Line: 90
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type changed
Line 91: `variant={ButtonVariant.control}` — The value `control` is still valid in the new type (it's in both the old and new union). **No change needed.**

### Fix 2: InputGroup family migration — wrap children in `<InputGroupItem>`
Line 79-97: `<InputGroup>` contains `<TextInput>` (line 80) and `<Button>` (line 90) as direct children. In PF v6, all direct children of `<InputGroup>` must be wrapped in `<InputGroupItem>`. I need to:
- Import `InputGroupItem` from `@patternfly/react-core`
- Wrap `<TextInput>` in `<InputGroupItem>`
- Wrap `<Button>` in `<InputGroupItem>`

### Fix 3: Icon children to `icon` prop on Button
Line 90-96: The `<Button>` contains only icon elements (`<EyeIcon />` or `<EyeSlashIcon />` via ternary). Since the button contains ONLY icon content, I should move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing. However, this is a ternary expression `{passwordHidden ? <EyeIcon /> : <EyeSlashIcon />}` — the entire expression is icon content, so it should be moved to the `icon` prop.

Let me apply all three fixes:

arguments.after: import { Button, ButtonVariant, InputGroup, InputGroupItem, TextInput } from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.before: import { Button, ButtonVariant, InputGroup, TextInput } from '@patternfly/react-core';

arguments.after:
<InputGroup>
          <InputGroupItem isFill>
            <TextInput
              spellCheck="false"
              isRequired
              type={passwordHidden ? 'password' : 'text'}
              id={OpenstackSecretFieldsId.Token}
              name={OpenstackSecretFieldsId.Token}
              value={token}
              onChange={onChangeFactory(OpenstackSecretFieldsId.Token)}
              validated={tokenValidation.type}
            />
          </InputGroupItem>
          <InputGroupItem>
            <Button
              variant={ButtonVariant.control}
              onClick={onClickTogglePassword}
              aria-label={passwordHidden ? 'Show password' : 'Hide password'}
              icon={passwordHidden ? <EyeIcon /> : <EyeSlashIcon />}
            />
          </InputGroupItem>
        </InputGroup>
arguments.before:
<InputGroup>
          <TextInput
            spellCheck="false"
            isRequired
            type={passwordHidden ? 'password' : 'text'}
            id={OpenstackSecretFieldsId.Token}
            name={OpenstackSecretFieldsId.Token}
            value={token}
            onChange={onChangeFactory(OpenstackSecretFieldsId.Token)}
            validated={tokenValidation.type}
          />
          <Button
            variant={ButtonVariant.control}
            onClick={onClickTogglePassword}
            aria-label={passwordHidden ? 'Show password' : 'Hide password'}
          >
            {passwordHidden ? <EyeIcon /> : <EyeSlashIcon />}
          </Button>
        </InputGroup>

content.text: Now let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. All changes are properly applied.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (`control` value)
**No change needed.** The value `ButtonVariant.control` (`'control'`) is still valid in the new type union (`'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`). The type change only **added** `'stateful'` — no existing values were removed.

### Fix 2 — InputGroup family migration (wrap children in `<InputGroupItem>`)
**Applied.** 
- Added `InputGroupItem` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core` (line 7).
- Wrapped `<TextInput>` in `<InputGroupItem isFill>` (lines 80–91) — `isFill` ensures the text input stretches to fill available space, which is the standard pattern for the primary input in an InputGroup.
- Wrapped `<Button>` in `<InputGroupItem>` (lines 92–99).

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on Button
**Applied.**
- Moved the icon ternary expression `{passwordHidden ? <EyeIcon /> : <EyeSlashIcon />}` from children to the `icon` prop on `<Button>` (line 97).
- Made the `<Button>` self-closing (line 98) since it now has no children content.
